title: STAR missing personal action probe
trigger_signals: candidate uses team-level wording
answer contains vague verbs such as responsible for, promoted, coordinated, optimized
personal contribution is unclear
recommended_probe_moves: ask what the candidate personally did
ask for one concrete decision or action
separate candidate contribution from team contribution
disallowed_moves: do not ask multiple questions at once
do not accuse the candidate of exaggerating
scoring_impact: If personal action remains unclear, action/contribution evidence should not be treated as strong.
source_titles: STAR / PAR 行为面试回答结构：高质量 RAG 方法论版
追问边界 / Probe Boundaries：AI 面试官追问设计

title: STAR missing result or metric probe
trigger_signals: answer says effect was good but gives no result
answer lacks before-after comparison
answer lacks feedback or measurable signal
recommended_probe_moves: ask for a measurable result
ask for before-after comparison
ask who verified the outcome
disallowed_moves: do not require fake metrics if none exist
allow qualitative feedback when quantitative metrics are unavailable
scoring_impact: Without result or metric evidence, impact claims should remain partial rather than strong.
source_titles: BARS / 行为锚定评分量表：面试评分体系设计
STAR / PAR 行为面试回答结构：高质量 RAG 方法论版

title: Funnel vague answer into a concrete event
trigger_signals: answer is abstract
answer contains opinions but no event
candidate has not selected a specific example
recommended_probe_moves: ask the candidate to choose one real event
ask for time, role, target, and constraint
narrow the scope before deeper probing
disallowed_moves: do not jump to pressure challenge before evidence exists
do not ask broad follow-up again
scoring_impact: A generic answer should trigger evidence collection instead of immediate low scoring.
source_titles: 追问边界 / Probe Boundaries：AI 面试官追问设计

title: Challenge attribution boundary without attacking candidate
trigger_signals: candidate claims success but causal link is unclear
external factors may explain the result
answer over-attributes team or business result to self
recommended_probe_moves: ask what would have happened without the candidate's action
ask which evidence supports the attribution
ask about alternative explanations
disallowed_moves: do not challenge facts not stated by candidate
scoring_impact: If attribution remains unsupported, result evidence should be capped below strong.
source_titles: 面试官偏差控制：结构化面试与评分一致性
结构化面试：实践指南（RAG 中文增强双语版）

title: Technical depth and trade-off probe
trigger_signals: technical solution is mentioned without constraints
no complexity, boundary, testing, or failure analysis
candidate gives tool names without reasoning
recommended_probe_moves: ask for constraints and bottleneck
ask why this solution over alternatives
ask how the result was verified
ask about edge cases or failure modes
disallowed_moves: do not ask trivia unrelated to the candidate's project
do not turn project interview into pure exam unless configured
scoring_impact: Technical depth requires reasoning, trade-off, validation, and boundary evidence, not just naming tools.
source_titles: 技术面深挖：软件工程/技术岗位结构化追问与评分
BARS / 行为锚定评分量表：面试评分体系设计

title: Reflection and learning probe
trigger_signals: main event evidence is mostly sufficient
candidate has not explained learning or future change
late-stage interview needs synthesis
recommended_probe_moves: ask what the candidate would change next time
ask what principle they extracted
ask how the learning changed later behavior
disallowed_moves: do not ask reflection before basic event evidence exists unless recovering
scoring_impact: Reflection evidence can improve learning agility and seniority judgment but should not replace action/result evidence.
source_titles: STAR / PAR 行为面试回答结构：高质量 RAG 方法论版

title: Bias controlled clarification before scoring
trigger_signals: answer may be over- or under-valued due to fluency
candidate background may bias interpretation
evidence is ambiguous before scoring
recommended_probe_moves: ask for observable behavior
ask for evidence before judging quality
keep the question neutral and anchored
disallowed_moves: do not score based on fluency, school, company, or confidence
do not infer ability from resume background alone
scoring_impact: Ambiguous evidence should be clarified before assigning strong positive or negative judgment.
source_titles: 面试官偏差控制：结构化面试与评分一致性
结构化面试：实践指南（RAG 中文增强双语版）
